# PHIL.180 ? Prepare for Multiple Scenarios

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** prepare_for_multiple_scenarios
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Plan for various futures rather than betting on one

## Application
Develop scenarios, prepare contingencies, maintain flexibility, adapt to reality
